message:
fix: return HTTP 403 on setup CSRF rejection and warn on empty tokens

Post-merge fix for PR #1956. The SetupAPIHandler CSRF rejection was
returning HTTP 200 via sendJSON instead of 403 via sendError, making
blocked attacks indistinguishable from successful requests. Also adds
log warnings when API handlers are constructed with empty CSRF tokens
to prevent silent bypass of CSRF protection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
